problem_title: Compliance slows with fragmented jurisdiction rules
problem_description: CASPs face operational friction when multiple jurisdictional requirements and regulatory updates remain unconnected. This creates manual work, inconsistent decisions and weak traceability across onboarding, screening and reporting workflows under MiCA obligations.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects jurisdiction-specific rules, regulatory updates, provider outputs and case workflows into one operational layer that helps CASPs streamline MiCA compliance with clear audit trails and consistent decision evidence.
workflow_title: From regulatory update to internal rules
workflow_description: SFTY monitors jurisdictional regulatory changes and maps them to internal policies to support consistent rule updates, case workflows and audit-ready compliance evidence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides CASPs a controlled compliance layer connecting provider outputs with audit evidence and deployment standards for jurisdiction-specific MiCA readiness.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for MiCA compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer for MiCA readiness, connecting regulatory rules, screening, onboarding, Travel Rule and reporting workflows into one operational system for CASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support multi-jurisdiction workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY monitors region-specific rules, maps regulatory updates to internal policies, routes reviews and manages cases across jurisdictions, supporting consistent compliance amid evolving MiCA and related regulations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready MiCA evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence packages with audit-grade records, supporting traceability between regulatory changes, internal rule updates and compliance actions under MiCA.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows without disrupting current compliance stacks or provider agreements.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace underlying providers but connects their outputs into structured cases, decisions, rules monitoring and audit-ready reporting workflows for MiCA compliance.
final_title: Structure MiCA compliance workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects jurisdictional rules, provider outputs and case workflows into audit-ready MiCA compliance evidence.
